events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. The condition is an uninsulated suction (vapor) line on the condenser/heat pump line set — a rough-in defect since bare suction lines cause condensation, energy loss, and reduced capacity (heat loss in heating mode for heat pumps). This fails per manufacturer install instructions and IMC/IRC M1401, requiring insulation installation and re-inspection before closeout.
